summary: Completed full backend and frontend testing for Wiener Lehrlingsball 2027 MVP. All 19 backend API tests pass. All frontend flows verified: Coming Soon gate, newsletter signup, secret unlock (LBALL2027), navigation, Kontakt form, Tickets newsletter, admin login/dashboard/logout.

issues: Stats show 0 counts momentarily due to async data load ('Lade Daten...' shown). Data loads correctly after ~1-2s - minor UX, not a bug.

critical_code_review_comments: CORS uses allow_origins='*' split by comma - if CORS_ORIGINS env var is not set, defaults to '*' which is fine for preview but should be tightened for production
Admin password seeded fresh on every startup (bcrypt hash changes each time). The update branch always replaces hash even if password hasn't changed - minor inefficiency but not a bug
No brute-force lockout on admin login endpoint (as specified in playbook testing instructions). Not required by original spec but worth noting for production security.
seed_data_creation: Created test subscribers/contacts during testing: test_lball_auto@example.com, test_tickets_src@example.com, frontend_test_user@example.com, tickets_test_user@example.com, kontakt_test@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: MVP fully verified. Backend 19/19 tests pass. Frontend all flows work: Coming Soon gate unlock via LBALL2027, newsletter subscription with toast, navigation to all 4 pages (Startseite/Infos/Tickets/Kontakt), Kontakt form submission, Admin login/dashboard/logout. No bugs found.
